NAVAREA XIX 21/23

 ANDOYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT LAUNCH OPERATIONS DAILY IN PERIOND 1600 TO 2300 UTC FROM 17 TO 26 MAR 
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF AND AVOID FOLLOWING HAZARD AREA

 VORTEX OUTER
